Customer Prompt: I forgot my password. How can I reset it?
Reference Answer: Click the "Forgot Password" option on the login page, enter your registered email address, and follow the instructions in the password reset email.

Customer Prompt: I can't log into my account.
Reference Answer: Verify your email and password are correct. If the issue continues, use the password reset option or contact support.

Customer Prompt: My account is locked. What should I do?
Reference Answer: Wait for the lock period to expire or contact customer support to verify your identity and unlock the account.

Customer Prompt: How do I change my email address?
Reference Answer: Go to your account settings, update your email address, and verify the new email using the confirmation link.

Customer Prompt: I changed my email yesterday, and now I can't sign in.
Reference Answer: Try logging in with your new email address. If the problem continues, contact support to verify your account and restore access.

Customer Prompt: I never received the verification email after signing up.
Reference Answer: Check your spam folder, confirm the email address was entered correctly, and request a new verification email.

Customer Prompt: I accidentally deleted my account. Can I recover it?
Reference Answer: Contact customer support immediately. Account recovery may be possible depending on company policies and the time since deletion.

Customer Prompt: Someone changed my account details without my permission.
Reference Answer: Secure your account by resetting your password immediately and contact support to investigate unauthorized access.

Customer Prompt: I upgraded my subscription, changed my email, and now I can't log in or receive password reset emails.
Reference Answer: Verify your identity with customer support so they can restore your account, update your email, and preserve your subscription information.

Customer Prompt: I lost access to both my email and two-factor authentication. How can I recover my account?
Reference Answer: Contact customer support with proof of identity. Recovery usually requires identity verification before restoring account access.

Customer Prompt: How do I link my account to Facebook or Google?
Reference Answer: Go to Account Settings, navigate to Linked Accounts, and select the service you want to link. Follow the authentication prompts to complete the link.

Customer Prompt: How can I permanently delete my account?
Reference Answer: Go to your account settings, select 'Delete Account' or 'Close Account', and confirm the action. Note that this action is permanent and cannot be undone.

Customer Prompt: I have two accounts by mistake. Can I merge them?
Reference Answer: Accounts cannot be merged directly. Please decide which account you wish to keep, and transfer any data or subscription manually, or contact support for help with paid features.

Customer Prompt: My account was suspended. How do I reactivate it?
Reference Answer: Please check your email for the suspension notice which details the reason and steps to appeal. If no email was received, contact support.

Customer Prompt: How do I update my profile picture and display name?
Reference Answer: Navigate to your profile settings, click on your profile picture to upload a new image, edit the name field, and click 'Save Changes'.

Customer Prompt: How do I update the phone number registered to my account?
Reference Answer: Go to Account Settings, select Security, click 'Edit' next to your phone number, enter the new number, and verify it via the SMS code sent to you.

Customer Prompt: I need to transfer the ownership of my business account to a colleague.
Reference Answer: Go to Account Settings, navigate to Users or billing, and invite the new owner. Once they accept, you can assign them the 'Owner' role and downgrade your access.

Customer Prompt: I am getting an error saying 'Username already exists' during signup.
Reference Answer: This means another user has registered that username. Please try a different username, or use your email address to sign up instead.

Customer Prompt: Where is my order?
Reference Answer: Track your order using the tracking number provided in your confirmation email.

Customer Prompt: My package hasn't arrived yet.
Reference Answer: Check the tracking information. If the estimated delivery date has passed, contact customer support for assistance.

Customer Prompt: I received the wrong product in my order.
Reference Answer: Contact customer support with your order number and photos of the received item to arrange a replacement or refund.

Customer Prompt: My package arrived damaged.
Reference Answer: Report the damage immediately, provide photos, and request a replacement or refund according to the return policy.

Customer Prompt: Can I change my delivery address after placing the order?
Reference Answer: Address changes may be possible before shipping. Contact customer support as soon as possible.

Customer Prompt: My order shows delivered, but I never received it.
Reference Answer: Verify the delivery address, check with neighbours or your building reception, and contact customer support to investigate with the courier.

Customer Prompt: My order was split into multiple shipments. Why?
Reference Answer: Orders are sometimes split if items are stocked in different warehouses or if some items are backordered. You can track each shipment separately using the tracking links provided.

Customer Prompt: How do I cancel my order?
Reference Answer: Go to 'My Orders' in your account, and if the order hasn't shipped yet, click the 'Cancel Order' button. If it has shipped, you will need to initiate a return once it arrives.

Customer Prompt: I requested a cancellation, but my order shipped anyway.
Reference Answer: If an order is already in the fulfillment pipeline, it cannot be canceled. Please refuse the delivery or use the provided return label to return the package for a refund once it arrives.

Customer Prompt: Why was I charged customs fees for my international delivery?
Reference Answer: International shipments may be subject to customs duties and import taxes set by the destination country's government. These fees are the responsibility of the recipient.

Customer Prompt: My tracking link hasn't updated in three days.
Reference Answer: Couriers sometimes miss scans during transit. If the status does not update for more than 5 business days, please contact support so we can file an inquiry with the carrier.

Customer Prompt: The courier refused to deliver my package. What should I do?
Reference Answer: This can happen if the delivery requires a signature or if access is restricted. Contact the courier using your tracking ID to schedule a redelivery or hold at a pickup location.

Customer Prompt: My package is being returned to sender due to an incorrect address.
Reference Answer: Once the package returns to our warehouse, we will issue a refund or reship the order. Please contact support to provide the correct address and arrange the reshipment.

Customer Prompt: An item is missing from the package I received.
Reference Answer: Please verify if your order was split into multiple shipments. If not, contact support with your order number and a photo of the packing slip to get the missing item shipped.

Customer Prompt: Can I schedule a specific date and time for my delivery?
Reference Answer: Standard shipping does not support scheduled delivery windows. You can manage your delivery options directly through the courier's tracking page (e.g., FedEx Delivery Manager).

Customer Prompt: I won't be home to sign for my package. Can I waive the signature?
Reference Answer: High-value shipments require a signature for security. You can authorize a release or redirect the package to a local courier pickup point using their tracking app.

Customer Prompt: My package was stolen from my porch after delivery.
Reference Answer: Please file a report with your local police and contact customer support with the case number so we can initiate a claim and assist you with a replacement or refund.

Customer Prompt: Can I pick up my order from a local store?
Reference Answer: If local pickup is available, select the 'Store Pickup' option at checkout. You will receive an email notification when your order is ready for pickup.

Customer Prompt: How do I request a refund?
Reference Answer: Submit a refund request through your account or contact customer support with your order number.

Customer Prompt: I was charged twice for the same purchase.
Reference Answer: Contact customer support with your payment details so they can investigate and process the duplicate charge refund if confirmed.

Customer Prompt: What is your return policy window?
Reference Answer: You can return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund or exchange. Items must be in their original, unused condition.

Customer Prompt: My return was delivered, but I haven't received my refund.
Reference Answer: Returns are processed within 5-7 business days of arrival at our warehouse. Once processed, the refund will take 3-5 days to show in your bank account.

Customer Prompt: Can I return a gift that was purchased for me?
Reference Answer: Yes, you can return a gift for store credit. Please contact customer support with the order number or the buyer's details to initiate the process.

Customer Prompt: Do I have to pay for return shipping?
Reference Answer: We offer free returns for defective or incorrect items. For change-of-mind returns, a return shipping fee will be deducted from your final refund amount.

Customer Prompt: I bought a digital product by mistake. Can I get a refund?
Reference Answer: Digital downloads are generally non-refundable once accessed or downloaded. If you have not downloaded the file, contact support to request an exception.

Customer Prompt: Can I get my refund as store credit instead of back to my card?
Reference Answer: Yes, you can select 'Store Credit' during the return flow. Store credit is issued instantly upon package scan by the courier.

Customer Prompt: I don't have a printer to print the return label. What do I do?
Reference Answer: Select the 'QR Code' return option at checkout. You can show the QR code on your phone at a local shipping drop-off location, and they will print the label for you.

Customer Prompt: Can I return clearance or final sale items?
Reference Answer: Items marked as 'Final Sale' or purchased from clearance events cannot be returned or refunded unless they arrive defective.

Customer Prompt: I returned part of my order. Why was I refunded less than expected?
Reference Answer: Please check your invoice. The refund will exclude any original shipping fees, promotional discounts that no longer apply, or return shipping fees.

Customer Prompt: I want to exchange my item for a different size. How?
Reference Answer: Initiate a return for the original item in your account and select 'Exchange' to choose your new size. The exchange order will ship once the return package is scanned.

Customer Prompt: The courier lost my return package. Can I still get a refund?
Reference Answer: If you used our pre-paid return label, the shipment is insured. Please contact support with your drop-off receipt to proceed with your refund.

Customer Prompt: It has been 35 days since my purchase. Can I still make a return?
Reference Answer: We have a strict 30-day return policy. However, contact customer support to request a manager's exception for store credit.

Customer Prompt: My refund was sent to an expired credit card. What should I do?
Reference Answer: Refunds must go back to the original payment method. Your bank will automatically route the funds to your new card or bank account. If not, contact your bank.

Customer Prompt: Can I return an item without its original packaging?
Reference Answer: To receive a full refund, items should be returned in original packaging. Returns missing packaging may incur a restocking fee or be rejected.

Customer Prompt: I want to dispute the refund amount I received.
Reference Answer: Please reply directly to the refund confirmation email with your order details and an explanation of the discrepancy so support can review it.

Customer Prompt: Can I return an online order at a physical retail store?
Reference Answer: Yes, you can return online purchases to any of our retail stores. Bring the item along with the order confirmation email or invoice.

Customer Prompt: How do I update my credit card details for subscription renewal?
Reference Answer: Log into your account, navigate to Settings > Billing, and click 'Update Payment Method'. Enter your new card details and save changes.

Customer Prompt: How do I cancel my monthly subscription?
Reference Answer: Go to Settings > Subscriptions, click 'Manage Subscription', and select 'Cancel'. You will retain access until the end of your current billing period.

Customer Prompt: When is my next subscription billing date?
Reference Answer: You can find your renewal date under Settings > Subscriptions in your account dashboard.

Customer Prompt: How do I switch from a monthly billing plan to an annual plan?
Reference Answer: Navigate to Settings > Billing > Plan, select the Annual option, and confirm. The switch will take effect on your next renewal date.

Customer Prompt: Where can I download my invoice or receipt?
Reference Answer: Go to Settings > Billing > Billing History. Click the download icon next to any invoice to save it as a PDF.

Customer Prompt: What is the difference between the Free, Pro, and Enterprise pricing plans?
Reference Answer: Free offers basic features. Pro adds advanced analytics and priority support. Enterprise includes custom integrations and dedicated managers.

Customer Prompt: I see an unrecognized charge on my credit card. What should I do?
Reference Answer: Check if a family member made the purchase or if you have a recurring subscription. If not, contact support with the date and amount of the charge.

Customer Prompt: How do I apply a student discount to my subscription?
Reference Answer: Submit proof of enrollment (e.g., student ID or institutional email) to our support portal. Once verified, the discount will apply to your next invoice.

Customer Prompt: My subscription renewal payment failed. How do I retry?
Reference Answer: Update your payment method in Billing settings. Our system will automatically re-attempt the transaction within 24 hours.

Customer Prompt: Can I pause my subscription temporarily instead of canceling?
Reference Answer: Yes, go to Subscriptions settings, select 'Manage', and click 'Pause Subscription'. You can pause it for up to 3 months.

Customer Prompt: I forgot to cancel my subscription and was charged. Can I get a refund?
Reference Answer: We offer a 7-day grace period for renewals. Contact customer support within 7 days of the charge to request a refund for the unused billing cycle.

Customer Prompt: How do I update my billing address?
Reference Answer: Navigate to Settings > Billing and click 'Edit Info' under Billing Details. Enter your new address and click save.

Customer Prompt: Why was I charged a different amount than the advertised price?
Reference Answer: The difference is usually due to local sales tax, VAT, or currency conversion fees depending on your region and payment provider.

Customer Prompt: I want to consolidate multiple team subscriptions under one central billing account.
Reference Answer: Please contact support with the list of accounts. We will configure a parent-child organization structure to compile all invoices into one.

Customer Prompt: My organization is tax-exempt. How do I get tax removed from my invoices?
Reference Answer: Upload your tax-exempt certificate to the billing portal or send it to support. Once verified, we will remove taxes from future billing cycles.

Customer Prompt: I was charged a chargeback fee by mistake. Can it be waived?
Reference Answer: If the dispute was opened in error and withdrawn, send us confirmation from your bank, and we will reverse the chargeback fee on your account.

Customer Prompt: The app keeps crashing every time I open it on my phone.
Reference Answer: Ensure your app is updated to the latest version. Try clearing the app cache, or reinstalling it from the app store.

Customer Prompt: I am getting a '404 Page Not Found' error on the site.
Reference Answer: This error means the page URL might be broken or moved. Go back to the homepage and search for the desired content, or clear cookies.

Customer Prompt: How do I clear my browser's cache and cookies?
Reference Answer: Press Ctrl+Shift+Delete (Windows) or Cmd+Shift+Delete (Mac) in your browser, select 'Cached images and files' and 'Cookies', and click 'Clear Data'.

Customer Prompt: The desktop application is not syncing with the cloud database.
Reference Answer: Check your internet connection, sign out of the desktop app, and sign back in to force a sync. Ensure your firewall is not blocking the app.

Customer Prompt: The platform is loading extremely slowly today. Is there an outage?
Reference Answer: Please check our official status page (status.example.com) for real-time reports on outages or server maintenance.

Customer Prompt: The export PDF feature is not working when I click download.
Reference Answer: Temporarily disable any pop-up blockers or browser extensions that might be blocking the download, and try clicking the button again.

Customer Prompt: How do I connect the platform to Slack or Zapier?
Reference Answer: Go to Settings > Integrations, select the app you want to connect (Slack or Zapier), and follow the authentication steps to link your workspaces.

Customer Prompt: Does this software work in offline mode?
Reference Answer: Yes, basic reading and local edits are supported offline. Changes will automatically sync to the cloud once an active internet connection is restored.

Customer Prompt: I am getting an API error: 'Rate limit exceeded (429)'. What does this mean?
Reference Answer: This means your API client has sent too many requests in a given timeframe. Please implement exponential backoff or contact support to upgrade limits.

Customer Prompt: Where do I find the setting to enable dark mode?
Reference Answer: Go to Settings > Appearance, and toggle the theme setting from 'Light' to 'Dark'.

Customer Prompt: How do I export all of my account data in JSON format?
Reference Answer: Go to Settings > Privacy & Data, select 'Export Data', choose 'JSON' format, and click 'Request Export'. You will receive a download link via email.

Customer Prompt: Which web browsers are officially supported by your platform?
Reference Answer: We officially support the latest stable versions of Google Chrome, Mozilla Firefox, Apple Safari, and Microsoft Edge.

Customer Prompt: I can't hear any audio on video playbacks. How do I fix it?
Reference Answer: Ensure your system volume is unmuted, check that the video player volume slider is turned up, and try playing the video in an incognito window.

Customer Prompt: Why am I not receiving push notifications on my mobile app?
Reference Answer: Go to your phone's system settings, select Apps > Our App, click Notifications, and ensure they are toggled to 'Allowed' or 'Enabled'.

Customer Prompt: I'm getting an error 'Payload Too Large' when uploading files. What is the limit?
Reference Answer: The maximum file size limit for uploads is 50MB. Please compress your files or split them into smaller parts before uploading again.

Customer Prompt: My software is stuck in a boot loop after a failed update.
Reference Answer: To resolve a boot loop, perform a clean reinstall. Uninstall the software, clear local application data folders, download the latest installer, and install.

Customer Prompt: How do I set up two-factor authentication (2FA) on my account?
Reference Answer: Go to Settings > Security, select 'Two-Factor Authentication', scan the QR code using an authenticator app (like Google Authenticator), and enter the verification code.

Customer Prompt: I want to delete all my personal data under GDPR. How can I submit this request?
Reference Answer: Go to Settings > Privacy, and click the 'Request Data Deletion (GDPR)' button. Our privacy team will process your deletion request within 30 days.

Customer Prompt: I think I received a phishing email pretending to be from your company. Where do I report it?
Reference Answer: Do not click any links in the email. Forward the suspicious email to security@example.com so our security team can investigate it.

Customer Prompt: Where can I view a history of all logins to my account?
Reference Answer: Go to Settings > Security and scroll down to the 'Login History' or 'Device Activity' section to see locations, devices, and times of recent logins.

Customer Prompt: I found a security vulnerability in your application. How should I report it?
Reference Answer: Please review our Responsible Disclosure Policy and submit the vulnerability details through our bug bounty portal or via email to security@example.com.

Customer Prompt: How can I prevent other users from seeing my email address in the search directory?
Reference Answer: Go to Settings > Privacy, and toggle off 'Show email in directory' to keep your email hidden from other users.

Customer Prompt: How do I customize my session timeout settings?
Reference Answer: Go to Settings > Security, navigate to Session Management, and set the duration of inactivity required before the app automatically logs you out.

Customer Prompt: I logged into my account from a public computer and forgot to log out. What do I do?
Reference Answer: Go to Security settings from a secure device, view 'Active Sessions', and click 'Log Out of All Devices' to terminate all active sessions.

Customer Prompt: How can I disable tracking cookies on your website?
Reference Answer: Click on the cookie settings banner at the bottom of the page or go to Privacy Settings, and toggle off non-essential tracking cookies.

Customer Prompt: How do I revoke API token access for a third-party app I no longer use?
Reference Answer: Go to Settings > Authorized Apps, find the application you wish to disconnect, and click 'Revoke Access'.

Customer Prompt: I received an alert that my account was logged into from an unrecognized device.
Reference Answer: If this was not you, change your password immediately, verify your account details are correct, and log out of other active sessions in Security settings.

Customer Prompt: What are your requirements for creating a secure password?
Reference Answer: Passwords must be at least 12 characters long and include a mix of uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters.

Customer Prompt: Someone has logged into my account and changed the 2FA key. How can I log them out?
Reference Answer: Please submit an emergency account lock request via our login help page. We will freeze active sessions and initiate identity verification.

Customer Prompt: Is my personal data encrypted when stored on your servers?
Reference Answer: Yes, all customer data is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.3 and at rest using AES-256 encryption standards to ensure data privacy.
